subcodes.first_line: O thou who wanderest in the wilderness of thoughts, seeking to uncover the mystery of mysteries! Verily, the veils have been rent asunder and the garments torn apart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من هام فی هیماء الافکار استکشافا لسر الاسرار قد هتکت الاستار و شقت الاطمار
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut]
